expectations.text: Response asks at least one question
expectations.evidence: Asks '谁在用这个工具，使用场景是什么？'

expectations.text: Response asks only ONE main question
Response explains why the question matters
expectations.evidence: '这个问题决定了 V1 的功能优先级和交互设计方向'
Starts directly with '目前已知的信息：' - no '好的，我来用 idea-flow...'
Accepts the CLI tool intent without questioning it. No '更像是一个方案' language. Directly asks about usage details.
Asks about target user/scenario (self, open source, non-tech), not whether user should build a CLI tool
